arts.ttl: Ademola Lookman and Barbra Banda are players of the year at African soccer awards
arts.sum: Nigeria winger Ademola Lookman and Zambia striker Barbra Banda won the men’s and women’s African player of the year awards on Monday night. Lookman, who plays for Atalanta, won after leading his Italian club to a Europa League victory in May, scoring all three goals in the first hat trick in a men’s European club final since 1975.
